# External Han Xin Code samples
#
# Each non-comment, non-empty line must be:
#     filename.png=expected decoded text
#
# Samples marked "FAIL" are not valid Han Xin Code symbols (their finder
# patterns match QR Code instead).
#
# The `zint_*.png` samples are generated by Zint 2.15.0 (`zint --barcode=116`)
# and are used as an independent reference for encoder/decoder correctness.

123456.png=123456
barcode.gif=This is a Han Xin by TEC-IT
image_2026-06-19_17-33-52.png=Hello World ! 你好，世界！
我是谁.png=FAIL
汉信码测试.png=FAIL

zint_123456_hires.png=123456
zint_我是谁_hires.png=我是谁
zint_汉信码测试_hires.png=汉信码测试
